titleStmt.title: SII 24.114: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 114. (A.R. No. 39 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records the sale of 3(1/2) mā of land to Ēnādi Araiyaṉ (vide No. 106 above) for 8 kāśu, by Śāndūr Magiḻalaṅkāradāsaṉ and his younger brother who obtained this from Periyakōyilpriyar in exchange for the garden land called Kōdai Āṇḍāḷ tirunandavanam. The record is dated in the 8th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
In continuation of ṇo 26. svasti śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu pāṇṭikulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tirup(pa)pacuRead tivaṭa tiruppatiyil Irukkum śrī vaiṣṇavar
kaḷil mūṅkilkuṭiccāntūr makiḻalaṅkāradāsanum En tampi Ivviruvom pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭuk kiḷiyūr nāṭṭup puḷiyaṅkuṭi Uṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Enāti Araiyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷutāy Eṅkaḷuṭaiymaiyāy varukiṟa tirunantavānam kotaiyāṇṭāḷ tirunantavānattaip periyakoyiṟ piriyar veṇṭa Ivarkku Ikkotaiyāṇṭāḷ tirunan=tavānattai kkuṭuttu Itarkkut talaimāṟu Ivan dāsan paḷḷikoṇṭān nārāyaṇaniṭai vi
lai koṇṭuṭaiya tirunantavanattai yivarutin tirunan=tavānat tukku vaṭapāṟkellai tirukaṟṟayūr dāsan tirunan=tavānattukkut teṟkum kiḻ pāṟkellai nittavinota mūventaveḷār ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavānam tiruviṇṇakar Itaṟku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tennārukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai Ānaviṭaṅkaiyār tirunan=tavānam tennaraṅkan peruttevikkuk kiḻakkum Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nila
m mummāvarai Iṉnilam mummāvaraiyum Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷ Anṟāṭu narkācu 8- Ikkācu Eṭṭuṅkaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ippuḷiyaṅkuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Enāti Araiyaṟku Immūṅkiṟkuṭi cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāra dāsanum En tampi ci kurukūr nampiyum Ivviruvom Innilam mummāvaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilai
pporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 8- Ikācu Eṭṭum kkoṇṭu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷ koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ippuḷi yaṅkuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Ēnāti Araiyaṟku mūṅkil kuṭic cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāṟa dāsanum En tampi ci kurukūr nampiyum Ivviruvom Innilam mummā varaiyilum menok
kina maramum kiḻ nokkina kiṇaṟum vatāna Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 8- Ikkāceṭṭum Innilattukku vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutiyāvatākavum Itu vallatu porumāvaṟu tip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavārallātārākavum Ipparicu Icainta vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟpa
tto kuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāta Ēnāti Araiyaṟku muṅkilkuṭi cāttūr makiḻalaṅkāra dāsanum En tampi ci kurukūr nampiyum Ivviruvom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Ippiramāṇam Eḻutinen maddhyastan Ārāvamutu villiyāna patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvaiyṣṇavappiriyanen Ivai yenneḻuttu Ippaṭi kku Ivai mūṅkilkuṭi cāntūr makiḻalaṅkāradā
san neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mūṅkil kuṭi cāttūr malaikkiniya ninṟāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven perumpuli(pū)yūr Āṇṭa piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kan=tāṭait tirumaṅkaiyāḻvān Ippaṭi Aṟiven koyiṟkaṇakku neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi
ven tiruveṅkaṭappiccanneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Anan=tanārāyaṇapaṭṭanen paḷḷi koṇṭān nārāyaṇan vāsudevan sayiñai yā(ta)namaikku tiruvaraṅkaveḷā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirunaṟaiyūr tirukkaḻakaṇṭan Eḻuttu parakecari Āṇṭān samiñai yātamaikku cikulacekara Araiyanneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven paḷḷi koṇṭān Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 24.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
